product_surfaces: cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CLI-OFFLINE-SYNC-NO-HTTP exercises the real CLI startup route for gitcode-mcp sync without --live with a configured repository and available httptest.Server, asserting default fixture-backed sync succeeds and the server request count remains zero.

internal/service/service_test.go::TestSyncResourcesCachesFixtureRecords exercises the sync service/cache runtime path for fixture-backed records and asserts deterministic fixture records ISSUE-42 and WIKI-HOME are present in the configured cache.

cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CLI-LIVE-SYNC-USES-LIVE-PROVIDER exercises the real CLI startup route for gitcode-mcp sync --live with a mocked GitCode-compatible httptest.Server, asserting the mock server is reached and fixture marker IDs ISSUE-42 and WIKI-HOME do not appear in live command output.

cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CRED-LIVE-WRITE-MOCK-KEYCHAIN exercises the real CLI startup route for gitcode-mcp create-issue --live with a test keychain-equivalent credential source and mocked GitCode-compatible httptest.Server, asserting the mock server is reached and fixture client is read-only does not reach the live product surface.

internal/gitcode/provider_test.go::TestScenario005FixtureBoundaryContract and TestScenario005FixtureReadOnlyTyped exercise the fixture-provider boundary contract and typed read-only classification used by product tests to classify accidental live-route fixture fallback.
go test ./... is run by run.sh as the offline acceptance gate so these CLI integration and fixture-boundary scenarios remain executable under the repository-wide test command.
freshness: Current target runtime at validation execution time with fresh temporary cache/config paths created by Go tests and no live GitCode credentials, live network access, real device access, or OS Keychain access.

mocks_used.httptest.Server: Mocks only external GitCode-compatible HTTP endpoints and records request counts while exercising production CLI startup, repository binding, live provider routing, sync, create-issue, and cache/runtime paths.
mocks_used.test keychain-equivalent credential sour: Supplies a deterministic in-memory test token for the live create scenario without using OS Keychain or real credentials.
mocks_used.environment isolation: run.sh unsets GITCODE_TOKEN, GITCODE_MCP_TEST_KEYCHAIN_TOKEN, and GITCODE_API_URL before invoking Go tests so each scenario uses only its explicit test setup.

validation_scope: Validation artifacts are limited to tests/design_package/005-fixture-provider-task-1-guard-fixture-boundary/. No production source, production docs, runtime code, server code, app code, root AGENTS.md, or product configuration is modified by this validation materialization.

live_validation.reason: Live validation is disabled for this task. All evidence is deterministic offline validation using stubbed external dependencies only.

device_validation.reason: Device validation is disabled for this task.
